feat.name: Guard's Fury
feat.text: Some Ulfen Guards tap into a well of fury to protect their charges. You can use the Rage action. While raging, you take a –1 penalty to AC. If you’re adjacent to your designated ally while raging, increase the additional damage from Rage from 2 to 4.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.prerequisite: *Ulfen Guard Dedication*; you can’t already use the *Rage* action
